title: Build the vault scaffold generator service
implementation_notes: Create cli/scaffold.ts — pure function, no side effects besides writing files.
ScaffoldOptions: { vaultRoot: string, workspaceName: string, workspaceId: string, projectName: string, projectId: string, boardName?: string }
ScaffoldResult: { created: string[], skipped: string[], alreadyExists: boolean }
Abort (alreadyExists: true) if vault/shared/ already exists — never overwrite.
Seed files to generate (all must pass schema validators):
IDs: use the provided names slugified (e.g. 'My App' → 'my-app'), prefix with type (ws-, project-, board-, column-).
Timestamps: use the current ISO timestamp for created_at and updated_at.
Do not hardcode ws-demo anywhere — all IDs come from ScaffoldOptions.
acceptance_criteria: scaffoldVault() creates all required directories and seed files.
Calling scaffoldVault() twice on the same root returns alreadyExists: true and writes nothing.
All generated markdown files parse cleanly through the existing vault schema validators.
Generated project references the generated board; generated board references the generated columns.
Unit tests cover: fresh init, idempotency guard, slugification edge cases.
completion_summary: Added cli/scaffold.ts with portable vault/shared scaffolding, already-exists protection, and scaffold tests covering fresh init and slugification.
